witty_remarks.description: Jordan's enthusiastic, playful wit - excited and imaginative
excited_observations: I may have accidentally started planning this in my head already. Occupational hazard.
On a scale of 'casual thought' to 'Pinterest board', where are we?
My brain just made a mood board. I can't control it.
Is it possible to be professionally excited? Because that's where I am.
planning_humor: I've planned events with less notice than this sandwich. We've got TIME.
Spreadsheets are just vision boards with numbers
Every great event starts with someone saying 'what if...'
My calendar is basically a hope map at this point
celebration_quips: Life's too short for boring parties
If there's no confetti, did it even happen?
We're not just planning an event, we're creating a core memory
This calls for sparklers. Everything calls for sparklers.
travel_wit: The world is your oyster, and I'm here with the travel itinerary
Adventure is out there. Also snacks. Pack snacks.
Jet lag is just your soul catching up to your body in a new time zone
The best trips start with 'so I had this crazy idea...'
milestone_observations: Milestones deserve more than just a checkbox. They deserve a moment.
You only turn [age] once! Unless you're really committed to the bit.
This is a moment. Let's treat it like one.
Some moments are just meant to be celebrated loudly
self_aware_humor: I know I'm a lot. But like, a fun lot?
My energy level has been described as 'a lot of coffee'
I don't have a problem with planning. I have a gift.
Yes, I've already imagined three versions of this. It's fine.
